html:
2026-0616
2026-06-12GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityOrder Authorizing the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of Republic of Ecuador Concerning the Free Trade AgreementOrder authorizing (1) the Prime Minister or the Minister of Foreign Affairs to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Free Trade Agreement between Canada and the Republic of Ecuador; or (2) the Minister of Foreign Affairs to execute and issue an Instrument of Full Powers, authorizing the individuals mentioned in the order, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement.N/A
subject: Order Authorizing the Agreement between the Government of Canada and the Government of Republic of Ecuador Concerning the Free Trade Agreement
precis: Order authorizing (1) the Prime Minister or the Minister of Foreign Affairs to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Free Trade Agreement between Canada and the Republic of Ecuador; or (2) the Minister of Foreign Affairs to execute and issue an Instrument of Full Powers, authorizing the individuals mentioned in the order, to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, subject to ratification, the Agreement.
